name: Sparinvest SICAV - Long Danish Bonds
summary: Sparinvest SICAV - Long Danish Bonds is an open ended fixed income mutual fund launched by Sparinvest S.A. The fund is managed by Sparinvest Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. It invests in fixed income markets of Denmark. The fund primarily invests in DKK denominated long term bonds. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against a composite index consisting of 37.5% Nordea CM 5 Govt. + 62.5% Nordea CM 7 Govt. Sparinvest SICAV - Long Danish Bonds was formed on November 28, 2001 and is domiciled in Luxembourg.
